models.name: DummyRegressor
models.description: Predicts the training set mean. Required baseline for regression tasks.

models.name: DummyClassifier
models.description: Predicts majority class or uniform random. Required baseline for classification.

models.name: LinearModel
models.description: Ridge regression (regression) or LogisticRegression (classification). Interpretable baseline.

models.name: RandomForest
models.description: Ensemble of decision trees. Robust, parallelizable, handles mixed types well.

models.name: XGBoost
models.description: Gradient boosted trees. High-capacity, widely used benchmark for tabular data.

models.name: LightGBM
models.description: Histogram-based gradient boosting. Fast on larger datasets.

models.name: ARIMA
models.description: Classical univariate time-series model. Strong baseline for single-series forecasting.

models.name: LSTM
models.description: Recurrent neural network with long-range memory. CPU-feasible at small scale.

models.name: Chronos
models.description: Pretrained zero-shot forecasting transformer (Amazon). Works without feature engineering.

models.name: SVR
models.description: Support Vector Regression. Good for small-to-medium datasets with non-linear boundaries.
